---
title: "Module 1 Code Tutorial"
subtitle: "Discriminant Validity, Omitted Variable Bias, Measurement Invariance, Latent Classes, and Outliers"
---

<!--
  SETUP INSTRUCTIONS
  ==================
  1. Open "Module 1- Measurement/Module 1 Code Tutorials.qmd"
  2. Copy everything AFTER the closing --- of the YAML block (i.e., from the ```{r setup chunk onward)
  3. Paste it below this comment block
  4. Also copy the figs/ folder from "Module 1- Measurement/figs/" into this folder (module-1/figs/)

  The YAML above replaces the original --- block entirely.
  Do NOT copy the original title/format/execute YAML — it is already handled by _quarto.yml.
-->
